# Hosaka Web Desktop

> A touch-friendly web desktop shell that wraps a simulated terminal,
> video player, and webhook-powered messages. Static-deployable to
> GitHub Pages / Vercel / Cloudflare. Coexists with the original
> Hosaka Python TUI for appliance mode.

Start with AGENTS.md. It is the highest-signal file in the repo.

## Project docs
- [README](../README.md): overview, quick start, deploy targets.
- [AGENTS](../AGENTS.md): conventions, commands, non-goals.
- [Architecture](./architecture.md): layout and rationale.
- [Local development](./local-development.md): dev loop.
- [Deployment](./deployment.md): GH Pages / Vercel / Cloudflare / custom domain.
- [LLM](./llm.md): Gemini BYOK + proxy (api/gemini.ts) setup + env vars.
- [Appliance mode](./appliance-mode.md): kiosk on Raspberry Pi.
- [Context seed](./context.seed.json): structured facts, JSON.

## Source of truth
- [frontend/src/shell/HosakaShell.ts](../frontend/src/shell/HosakaShell.ts): simulated terminal shell.
- [frontend/src/shell/commands.ts](../frontend/src/shell/commands.ts): command taxonomy.
- [frontend/src/llm/gemini.ts](../frontend/src/llm/gemini.ts): Gemini client (BYOK + proxy).
- [frontend/src/App.tsx](../frontend/src/App.tsx): top-level panel registry.
- [api/gemini.ts](../api/gemini.ts): Vercel Edge Function proxy; reads GEMINI_API_KEY.
- [Hosaka_Field-Terminal/hosaka/main_console.py](../Hosaka_Field-Terminal/hosaka/main_console.py): original TUI; canonical command list.

## Optional
- [instructions.md](../instructions.md): historical mission brief (aspired to AWS; superseded by this static-first build).
- [Hosaka_Field-Terminal/docs/no_wrong_way_manifest.md](../Hosaka_Field-Terminal/docs/no_wrong_way_manifest.md): operator manifest.
